heading: Translation of publications into foreign languages
label: 2242b Translation of publications into foreign languages
text: On and after , funds appropriated to the Department of Agriculture by this Act may be used for translation of publications of the Department of Agriculture into foreign languages when determined by the Secretary to be in the public interest.October 28, 1991
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1992. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 102–142105 Stat. 878Oct. 28, 1991
